dsl_rule.translation_notes: Opening gap confirmation detected by comparing open vs prev_close (gap) and close vs open (confirmation direction). Entry conditions require both gap occurrence and directional confirmation. Exit conditions use reversal logic (close crossing open). Success rates (61% bull, 43% bear) are documented in parameters but not encoded as hard filters since they represent historical statistics rather than entry/exit rules. Context-dependent direction allows signal to trigger both long (bullish gap confirmed) and short (bearish gap confirmed) entries based on gap direction.

source_rule_text: Opening Gap Confirmation: Price gap at open; reversal occurs 61% in bull market, 43% in bear market
